name: eyra-load-tests
description: Artillery load tests for Eyra data donation API

scripts.generate-testdata: dd if=/dev/urandom of=testdata_1MB.bin bs=1000000 count=1 2>/dev/null && dd if=/dev/urandom of=testdata_10MB.bin bs=1000000 count=10 2>/dev/null && dd if=/dev/urandom of=testdata_100MB.bin bs=1000000 count=100 2>/dev/null && dd if=/dev/urandom of=testdata_200MB.bin bs=1000000 count=200 2>/dev/null && echo 'Test data files generated'
